title: Response ↔ Impact Pairing — Impacts (synthetic)
description: **Synthetic illustrative fixture — not a real source dataset.** This collection holds the Impact half of a worked Response ↔ Impact pairing that anchors the [Response ↔ Impact Boundary Rules](https://github.com/IFRCGo/monty-stac-extension/blob/main/docs/model/response-impact-boundary.md) document. Each item carries a single thematic figure (pattern **P4**: one Impact per thematic class) split out of the paired `eo-gra` Response in the sibling `response-impact-pairing-responses` collection. Every item links back to that Response via `rel: derived_from` (`roles: ["response"]`) and shares the same `monty:corr_id`. All identifiers (`EMSR-DEMO-001`, …) are obvious placeholders.
